02_notebook_execution_flow.title: Notebook Execution Flow
02_notebook_execution_flow.subtitle: Reference slide: the notebook mainly orchestrates discovery, caching, full-reference generation, and the 48-configuration sweep.

03_single_configuration_reconstruction.title: Single-Configuration Reconstruction
03_single_configuration_reconstruction.subtitle: Reference slide: the code path taken by one `(line_count, z_slice_count, gap_count)` choice from measured `S11` to saved reduced `E_T` products.

04_configuration_space.title: Configuration Space
04_configuration_space.subtitle: Reference slide: the discrete sweep axes, the discovered gap ordering, and how reduced dataset size grows across the configuration grid.

05_figs_folder_guide.title: How To Navigate figs/
05_figs_folder_guide.subtitle: Reference slide: `figs/` contains one diagnostics area, one comparisons area, and a configuration tree that mirrors the parameter sweep.

06_data_folder_guide.title: How To Navigate data/
06_data_folder_guide.subtitle: Reference slide: `data/` combines a small legacy layer with the current variation-study caches, bundles, metrics, and Slurm logs.
